utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check full specification: Each item requires the type plus costs. Health: includes description of physical and mental health insurance and a clear cost (€780/month) → fully specified. Property: home/contents insurance with costs → provided description and €95/month → fully specified. Travel: travel insurance with costs → description and €110/month → fully specified. Additional_services: any enhancement services with costs → description provided; cost stated as 'Included in the Health Coverage cost' which is a valid cost specification → fully specified. Total_budget: complete monthly/annual cost breakdown → includes monthly (€985/month) and annual (€11,820/year) → fully specified. Therefore, 5/5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three items by name: Enhanced EliteCare Premium Plan (health), EliteHome Premium Coverage (property), and EliteTravel Premium Plan (travel). We must match these to the closest names in the ground-truth ratings. The ground-truth includes EliteCare Premium Plan under primary_health (rating 6), EliteHome Premium Coverage under home_content (rating 6), and EliteTravel Premium Plan under travel_insurance (rating 5). The 'Enhanced' descriptor in the health plan appears to be a variant naming but maps to EliteCare Premium Plan.
